descriptionText: Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 | Guest Cabins:3 | Tax Not PaidONE OWNER - Only 150 hours engine use!!!!If you are looking for a well‑maintained cruising yacht with modern lines and the comfort needed for extended sailing, this Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 is a strong candidate. Designed by Felci and built by the renowned Dufour shipyard, she combines balanced sailing performance with a practical and welcoming interior layout. The boat has had one owner since new and has been kept in good condition, now available for viewings in Lefkada, Greece. With her Greek flag, solid build and thoughtful equipment list, she is suited both for private cruising and for those who may consider light charter use.Specifications• Builder: Dufour • Model: Dufour 412 GL • Designer: Felci • Flag: Greek • Year: 2018 • Length Overall: 11.98 m • Beam: 4.20 m • Waterline Length: 11.15 m • Displacement: 8,940 kg • Owners: 1 • Location: LefkadaDeck and Hull • White GRP hull • Cast‑iron keel • Teak cockpit • Cockpit cushions • Sprayhood • Bimini • Cockpit tableInterior • 3 double cabins • 2 bathrooms • Saloon conversion (2 berths) • Light mahogany wood • Stove, oven, fridgeEngine • Volvo D2‑40, 40 hp • Year: 2018 • Hours: 3500 (Jan 2026) • Fuel tank: 210 L • S‑drive • 3‑blade fixed propeller • Twin wheel steering • Bow thrusterElectronics (Raymarine) • Autopilot • VHF • Plotter • Log • Tridata • Wind • ECO • Compass • StereoSystems • 24/220V • Batteries: 3 + 2 (600 Ah total) • Fresh water: 380 L (plastic tanks) • 2 bilge pumps (electric + manual) • Battery charger • Boiler • Water pressure pump • Holding tanks • External showerRigging and Sails • Deck‑stepped mast • Bowsprit • 4 Lewmar winches • Lazy bag • Vang • Backstay • Furling jib • Standard mainsail and jibMooring and Safety • Anchor windlass • Chain • Mooring lines • Life raft • 8 fendersOverall, this Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 represents a well‑cared‑for yacht that offers a balance between comfort and performance. She is thoughtfully equipped for Mediterranean cruising and ready for a new owner.
descriptionHtml:
Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 | Guest Cabins:3 | Tax Not Paid

ONE OWNER - Only 150 hours engine use!!!!

If you are looking for a well‑maintained cruising yacht with modern lines and the comfort needed for extended sailing, this Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 is a strong candidate. Designed by Felci and built by the renowned Dufour shipyard, she combines balanced sailing performance with a practical and welcoming interior layout. The boat has had one owner since new and has been kept in good condition, now available for viewings in Lefkada, Greece. With her Greek flag, solid build and thoughtful equipment list, she is suited both for private cruising and for those who may consider light charter use.

Specifications

• Builder: Dufour
• Model: Dufour 412 GL
• Designer: Felci
• Flag: Greek
• Year: 2018
• Length Overall: 11.98 m
• Beam: 4.20 m
• Waterline Length: 11.15 m
• Displacement: 8,940 kg
• Owners: 1
• Location: Lefkada

Deck and Hull

• Cast‑iron keel
• Teak cockpit
• Cockpit cushions
• Sprayhood
• Bimini
• Cockpit table

Interior
• 3 double cabins
• 2 bathrooms
• Saloon conversion (2 berths)
• Light mahogany wood
• Stove, oven, fridge

Engine
• Volvo D2‑40, 40 hp
• Year: 2018
• Hours: 3500 (Jan 2026)
• Fuel tank: 210 L

Mooring and Safety

Overall, this Dufour 412 GL For Sale 2018 represents a well‑cared‑for yacht that offers a balance between comfort and performance. She is thoughtfully equipped for Mediterranean cruising and ready for a new owner.
